ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the transaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag categorizing the transaction */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the transaction */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact for the client */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone contact for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project ended */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag, such as 'UX Solutions' or 'Branding' */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid, On Hold, Completed, Draft) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Finance, Project Manager, Admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that was changed */,
  "change_made" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the field that was changed */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field that was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction related to the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message describing the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of transactions for the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Overall status of transactions in the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "project_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, edit, admin) */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or section of the system that the permission applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
